name: Multifunctional Organizational Lamp with Tech - Room Essentials™
description:
Elevate your study station or workspace with the Multifunctional Organizational Lamp with Tech from Room Essentials™. This table lamp features a cone-shaped shade with a rectangle base for a minimalist look, while the adjustable arm and head tilt help you adjust the lighting angle according. Plus, the base comes with a wireless charging pad and a DC power outlet to meet your everyday needs.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
